mandate: Extend existing /admin dashboard with partner management: partner list, approval workflow, partner status, referral metrics per partner
keyFindings: The existing admin page uses tab-based navigation — added Partners as a second tab with a pending count badge
Admin auth uses ADMIN_EMAILS constant check — all partner admin actions reuse this pattern
Expandable row detail in the partner table shows referral code, conversion rate, and individual referral list
whatWorked: Extending the existing AdminDashboard component rather than creating a separate admin page. Tab navigation keeps it cohesive. Using useTransition for non-blocking approve/suspend actions.
whatFailed: Nothing failed. Fixed a pre-existing missing PartnerStatus import in partner-actions.ts.
recommendationsForNextAgent: The invite form creates a pending partner record but does not send an email. The partner-auth agent handles the actual invitation delivery. Admin should copy the /partner-join?email=X link manually for v1.
spiritContribution: Gave the founder visibility and control over the partner channel from the existing admin dashboard.
